results.description: THIS IS A DELIVERY ORDER FOR AN EMERGENCY REPAIR TO US VESSEL LSV 6 LOCATED AT MUHAMMAD AL-AHMAD NAVAL BASE, KUWAIT.

results.action_type_description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE
results.description: THIS MOD 01 TO CONTRACT W911S0-15-D-0038/BR14 FOR EMERGENCY REPAIR TO US VESSEL LSV 6 INCORPORATES WORKSHEETS 1 AND 2 INTO THE CONTRACT.

results.action_type_description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE
results.description: THIS MOD 02 TO CONTRACT W911S0-15-D-0038/BR14 FOR EMERGENCY REPAIR TO US VESSEL LSV 6 INCORPORATES WORKSHEETS 3, 4 AND 5 INTO THE CONTRACT AS WELL AS IT EXTENDS THE POP.
THIS MOD INCORPORATES WORKSHEET 6 INTO THE CONTRACT.
